Instances

An instance is a temporary space where you can build things.

You can see the name of your instance in the URL right after "inst=" It will always be a collection of 3 words.

Anyone can join your instance if you give them those 3 words, or a link with the 3 words in it.

You should know, the instance only lasts for today. So, if you want to keep your work, you'll need to save it. (More on that in the next step)

NOTE: Since other people can join you, make sure not to put any personal or private information in the instance!

Publishing

Since everything in this instance will be deleted by tomorrow, you can save your work in two places.

Downloading Your Work

If you click on an empty space in the grid 3 times, it will open a menu for you.

Clicking "share" in that menu will give you options to save your work.

If you click the green "download" button, it will download a file that has a copy of all of the bots in the instance.

At any time, you can drag that file from your computer and drop it into CasualOS to make all of those bots.

Publishing Your Work

Publishing your work is just like downloading the bots, but it stores them online.

To publish, you need to pick an ID (or use the one that is generated for you).

You should also write down the ID because you will need it to find your work again.

If you click the "encrypt" button when you are publishing, you can set a password that will be needed if anyone tries to open your ID.
